title: Paper Doll b1.7.3
description: This mod basically add a render of yourself on the screen, made for b1.7.3
body:
# Info

This mod basically add a render of yourself on the screen. has config screen support to adjust positon, size and rotation of the render

This mod is a port of [Extra Render Player](https://modrinth.com/mod/extra-player-render)  (Specifically 1.7.10 version) to b1.7.3

![Screenshot of the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90e1d36f1daaa4092b3a2c4b2d0a2e0d6da3caca.png)

# Installation

This mod is purely client-side and server doesn't need it.

## [Babric](https://babric.github.io/)

- [StationAPI](https://modrinth.com/mod/stationapi) 

- [Glass Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/glass-config-api) (Optionally but need [Babric's Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu-babric) to actually access config)

## [Ornithe](https://ornithemc.net/)

- [OSL](https://modrinth.com/mod/osl)

- [Ornithe's Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu-ornithe) (Optionally, used to access config)
